query:
SELECT ca.gestanteId, g.nome, g.email, ca.tipo, ca.destino, ca.createdAt, ca.usado 
FROM codigosAcessoGestante ca 
JOIN gestantes g ON g.id = ca.gestanteId 
ORDER BY ca.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT ca.gestanteId, g.nome, g.email, ca.tipo, ca.destino, ca.createdAt, ca.usado 
FROM codigosAcessoGestante ca 
JOIN gestantes g ON g.id = ca.gestanteId 
ORDER BY ca.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
